metaData.Key Information: Originated from Germany in 1929. Every sheet is made with 100-percent virgin pulp and European microbridges technology connected tissue fibbers to achieve the perfect blend of strength and softness, providing the strongest wet strength, leaving no paper scraps on surface upon wiping. Dermatologically Test to be gentle on the skin. Premium Quality 4 Ply Thickness. Individually wrapped toilet rolls for better hygiene. German innovative Comfort Cushion technology, delivers ultimate softness with strong texture. Natural and fragrance free. 4 ply unscented Toilet Tissue Bathroom Rolls : Pack of 10 Rolls.

offers.description: Buy 1 Tempo Bathroom Tissue - Neutral (4ply) @ $9.90

product.description: Paseo Butterfly toilet roll is made from 100% pure pulp with premium quality tissues in 3 plush layers. This specially embossed range under our Butterfly series is tested and certified by Dermatest GmbH to be suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.
